hook_options: One adapter. Exact fit. Royal Pop only.

beats.line: Engineered for the Royal Pop’s exact case.
FKM rubber. No scratches. No glue.

caption_options.label: A
caption_options.caption:
40.35mm. 0.7mm. FKM. No drilling.

Cradle Adapter V1 is engineered for the Royal Pop’s exact case—40.35mm socket, 0.7mm retaining lip, and 22mm lug width. FKM rubber ensures a secure, scratch-free fit without drilling or glue.

Pre-Order Now

#RoyalPop #WatchAdapter #PrecisionEngineering #NoDrilling #FKMRubber

Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Swatch Group Ltd or Audemars Piguet.

caption_options.label: B
caption_options.caption:
Your Royal Pop wasn’t made for the wrist. Until now.

Cradle Adapter V1 converts it with exact specs: 40.35mm socket, 0.7mm lip, and FKM rubber. No drilling. No glue. Just a perfect fit.

Pre-Order Now

#WatchConversion #RoyalPopWrist #EngineeredFit #FKMAdapter

Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Swatch Group Ltd or Audemars Piguet.
